overview.summary: Hash-based lookup trades ordering for near-constant-time membership and retrieval.
overview.interviewRelevance: This topic appears regularly in coding interviews.

paragraphs: Hash Maps & Hash Sets shows up in practical systems whenever we need to organize or process data efficiently.
realWorldHook.ahaMoment: Hash Maps & Hash Sets becomes easier once you stop memorizing and start tracking the invariant.

definition.technicalDefinition: Hash Maps & Hash Sets is a core DSA topic with a reusable set of mental models and tradeoffs.

keyProperties: Understand the shape of the data.
